message:
perf(demo-showcase): wire set_fast into mermaid showcase screens (bd-4m1je)

Convert 15 buffer.set() calls to buffer.set_fast() in
mermaid_showcase.rs (12) and mermaid_mega_showcase.rs (3).
All calls write single-width ASCII cells with opaque/transparent bg,
making them ideal candidates for the fast path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
